title: Scholar SMP
description: A modpack for the players of Scholar SMP that focuses on combining the powers of magic and science...
body: The Scholar SMP modpack is created to be a creativity-driven modpack with a strong focus on magic and science and the combination of the two disciplines. It is being developed for the players of Scholar SMP, a small Minecraft server run by myself, Wolf of the Endless Storm. I'm posting it here because I thought others may be interested in this kind of modpack! (Also, to hopefully make it easier for Scholar SMP players to install and update the pack!) The pack is built with integrations like Hexcasting + ComputerCraft in mind. There are also included some more adventurous mods to break up the factory and automation development via way of exciting boss battles from Bosses of Mass Destruction and exploration of liminal spaces from The Corners. Currently included is the Visual Traveler's Titles resource pack (by un_roman on Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-travelers-titles) to make the dimension titles (provided by Traveler's Titles) more visually interesting.
